DailyGameStats.title: Daily Game Stats
DailyGameStats.description: Aggregated statistics for a specific game on a specific day.

gameType.description: The type of game (e.g., word_game, artists, links).

totalPlayed.description: Total number of games played for this type on this day.

lastUpdated.description: Last time this record was updated.

SupportClicks.title: Support Clicks
SupportClicks.description: Daily count of clicks on the 'Buy me a coffee' link.

count.description: Total number of clicks on this day.

sources.description: Breakdown of clicks by source button.

lastUpdated.description: Last time this record was updated.

ShareClicks.title: Share Clicks
ShareClicks.description: Daily count of clicks on the share buttons.

count.description: Total number of share clicks on this day.

sources.description: Breakdown of share clicks by source button.

lastUpdated.description: Last time this record was updated.

DailyLanguageStats.title: Daily Language Stats
DailyLanguageStats.description: Daily count of active users by language.

total.description: Total number of active users on this day.

languages.description: Breakdown of active users by language.

lastUpdated.description: Last time this record was updated.

DailyCompletionStats.title: Daily Completion Stats
DailyCompletionStats.description: Daily count of users who completed all games and their total scores.

totalCompleted.description: Total number of users who completed all games on this day.

distribution.description: Count of each total score achieved.

lastUpdated.description: Last time this record was updated.

DailyDiscoveryStats.title: Daily Discovery Stats
DailyDiscoveryStats.description: Daily count of new players who finished their first game.

count.description: Total number of new players discovered on this day.

sources.description: Breakdown of new players by the game they first played.

lastUpdated.description: Last time this record was updated.

totalSeconds.description: Total seconds spent across the app.

dailySeconds.description: Total seconds spent in daily games.

infiniteSeconds.description: Total seconds spent in infinite games.

navigationSeconds.description: Total seconds spent in navigation pages.

lastUpdated.description: Last time this record was updated.

BingoPlayer.title: Bingo Player
BingoPlayer.description: A player in a Bingo room.

BingoEvent.title: Bingo Event
BingoEvent.description: A live activity feed event in a Bingo room.

SystemLog.title: System Log
SystemLog.description: System logs for errors and events.

/game_stats/{statsId}.description: Collection of daily aggregated game statistics.

/support_clicks/{dateId}.description: Collection of daily support click counts.

/share_clicks/{dateId}.description: Collection of daily share click counts.

/language_stats/{dateId}.description: Collection of daily active users by language.

/completion_stats/{dateId}.description: Collection of daily completion stats and scores.

/discoveries/{dateId}.description: Collection of daily new player discovery counts.

/rooms/{roomId}/players/{playerId}.description: Collection of players in a Bingo room.

/rooms/{roomId}/events/{eventId}.description: Collection of live activity events in a Bingo room.

/system_logs/{logId}.description: System logs for errors and events.
